info.title: Communication Service API
info.description:
Provides bidirectional messaging between authenticated users.
All authenticated users can initiate chats with any other user.
Chat visibility is strictly limited to the two participants.

servers.description: Base path for the Communication API (routed via CloudFront → API Gateway)

get.description:
Proxies a search to Cognito to allow the Web-UI to find recipients by
username when initiating a new chat. Returns matching users' sub UUIDs
and usernames. This endpoint will be extracted to a dedicated User
Management Service in a future iteration.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Username prefix or substring to filter by

get.summary: List all chats for the authenticated user
get.description:
Returns all chat threads in which the authenticated user (identified by
x-auth-principal-id header) is a participant. No pagination — the number
of chats per user is expected to remain small.

200.description: All chats for the authenticated user

post.summary: Send a message (creates chat implicitly if it does not exist)
post.description:
Sends a message within a given chat context (GENERAL or SUBMISSION-specific).
For GENERAL chats, recipientId is required and identifies the other participant.
For SUBMISSION chats, recipientId is not needed — the chat is a group chat
shared by all participants of the submission.
The backend derives a deterministic chatId from the context.
The senderId is always taken from the x-auth-principal-id header, never
from the request body, preventing impersonation.

200.description: Message sent successfully; returns the chat detail with the new message

400.description: Bad Request — missing or invalid fields

get.summary: Get a chat thread with paginated message history
get.description:
Returns the chat metadata and a page of messages, ordered newest-first.
Default page size is 100 messages. Use nextToken to load older messages
(scroll-up pagination). Returns 403 if the caller is not a participant.
Web-UI note: load page 1 on chat open; fetch older pages using the
returned nextToken when the user scrolls to the top of the message list.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Pagination cursor returned from a previous response (for loading older messages)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of messages to return per page

403.description: Forbidden — the authenticated user is not a participant in this chat

sub.description: Cognito sub UUID — use this as recipientId when sending a message

type.description: GENERAL for an open thread; SUBMISSION for a submission-specific group thread

submissionId.description: Required when type is SUBMISSION. Any string identifier (typically a UUID).

recipientId.description: Cognito sub UUID of the recipient. Required for GENERAL chats; ignored for SUBMISSION chats.

otherParticipantId.description: Cognito sub UUID of the other participant (GENERAL chats only)

participants.description: All participant IDs (SUBMISSION group chats only)

senderId.description: Cognito sub UUID of the sender

participantA.description: Cognito sub UUID of participant A (GENERAL chats, lower UUID alphabetically)

participantB.description: Cognito sub UUID of participant B (GENERAL chats, higher UUID alphabetically)

nextToken.description: Cursor for loading the next (older) page of messages. Null when no more messages exist.
